title: Smoky Croatian-Style Tofu Skewers
description: A German-inspired dish featuring crispy-skinned tofu, smoky flavors, and a hint of Croatian spice. Perfect for a summer evening or outdoor BBQ.

ingredients.name: croatian spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most European markets or online

instructions: Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and thread onto skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together Croatian spice mix, smoked paprika, and garlic powder.
Brush the tofu with olive oil and sprinkle with spice mix.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden.
Serve with crispy onion rings and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Optional: Top with additional crispy onion rings or a dollop of vegan tzatziki sauce.
